requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 for PV Inverters — Botswana BOBS / BERA / BPC Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——博茨瓦纳BOBS / BERA / BPC要求
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2——波札那BOBS / BERA / BPC要求

summary.en: Botswana Standards (BOS) are published by BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) and predominantly adopt IEC standards. For solar PV inverters, the relevant EMC standards are IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions for equipment with input current up to and including 16 A per phase). These IEC standards are consistent with Botswana's IEC-aligned regulatory framework. BPC grid-connection conditions and BERA technical licensing conditions for PV generation are expected to reference IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as the applicable EMC standards, consistent with the IEC adoption policy under BOBS. As of 2026-06-14, no publicly available standalone Botswana national technical regulation specifically imposing IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 on solar inverters has been identified in the open literature — exporters must confirm the current EMC evidence requirements directly with BOBS (bobstandards.bw), BERA (bera.co.bw), and BPC (bpc.bw) before submitting equipment documentation.
summary.zh: 博茨瓦纳标准（BOS）由BOBS（博茨瓦纳标准局）发布，主要采纳IEC标准。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，相关EMC标准为IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——每相输入电流不超过16 A设备的谐波电流排放限值）。上述IEC标准与博茨瓦纳以IEC为导向的监管框架一致。BPC并网条件和BERA光伏发电技术许可条件预期将参照IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2作为适用EMC标准，与BOBS的IEC采纳政策一致。截至2026年6月14日，尚未在公开文献中发现专门对太阳能逆变器强制实施IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的博茨瓦纳国家独立技术法规——出口商在提交设备文件前须直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）、BERA（bera.co.bw）和BPC（bpc.bw）确认现行EMC证据要求。
summary.zht: 波札那標準（BOS）由BOBS（波札那標準局）發布，主要採納IEC標準。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，相關EMC標準為IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——每相輸入電流不超過16 A設備的諧波電流排放限值）。上述IEC標準與波札那以IEC為導向的監管框架一致。BPC併網條件和BERA光伏發電技術許可條件預期將參照IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2作為適用EMC標準，與BOBS的IEC採納政策一致。截至2026年6月14日，尚未在公開文獻中發現專門對太陽能逆變器強制實施IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的波札那國家獨立技術法規——出口商在提交設備文件前須直接向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）、BERA（bera.co.bw）和BPC（bpc.bw）確認現行EMC證據要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment (IEC standard referenced by BOBS BOS framework)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase) (IEC standard referenced by BOBS BOS framework)
Standards Act (Cap. 74:01) — BOBS mandate to adopt IEC standards as Botswana Standards (BOS)

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC is assessed under GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework. GB/T 37408 EMC testing is conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While IEC 62920 draws on IEC 61000-series test methods that are also referenced in Chinese domestic standards, the GB/T 37408 EMC test scope and referenced limits are not harmonised with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 as applicable under the BOBS IEC-adoption framework. Chinese EMC certificates based solely on GB/T 37408 are not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence for Botswana BOBS, BERA, or BPC requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC依据GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求。GB/T 37408 EMC测试在中国CNAS认可实验室进行。尽管IEC 62920借鉴了中国国内标准中也有引用的IEC 61000系列测试方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC测试范围和引用限值未与BOBS IEC采纳框架下适用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2协调。仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不被博茨瓦纳BOBS、BERA或BPC要求接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC依據GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求。GB/T 37408 EMC測試在中國CNAS認可實驗室進行。儘管IEC 62920借鑑了中國國內標準中也有引用的IEC 61000系列測試方法，但GB/T 37408 EMC測試範圍和引用限值未與BOBS IEC採納框架下適用的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2協調。僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不被波札那BOBS、BERA或BPC要求接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2的合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy the IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements applicable under the Botswana BOBS IEC-adoption framework and expected by BERA and BPC for grid-tied PV inverters. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. These reports should be specific to the power rating and configuration of the inverter being supplied to Botswana. Where harmonic test results were obtained under Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V, 50 Hz), consider whether retesting under Botswana grid conditions (230/400 V, 50 Hz) is required. Confirm the precise EMC evidence requirements with BOBS (bobstandards.bw), BERA (bera.co.bw), and BPC (bpc.bw) before finalising the equipment compliance package.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足博茨瓦纳BOBS IEC采纳框架下适用且BERA和BPC对并网光伏逆变器预期的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。上述报告应针对供应至博茨瓦纳的逆变器功率等级和配置。若谐波测试结果在中国电网条件（220/380 V、50 Hz）下获取，应考虑是否需要在博茨瓦纳电网条件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新测试。在最终确定设备合规包前，请向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）、BERA（bera.co.bw）和BPC（bpc.bw）确认精确的EMC证据要求。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足波札那BOBS IEC採納框架下適用且BERA和BPC對併網光伏逆變器預期的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。上述報告應針對供應至波札那的逆變器功率等級和配置。若諧波測試結果在中國電網條件（220/380 V、50 Hz）下取得，應考慮是否需要在波札那電網條件（230/400 V、50 Hz）下重新測試。在最終確定設備合規包前，請向BOBS（bobstandards.bw）、BERA（bera.co.bw）和BPC（bpc.bw）確認精確的EMC證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under the BOBS IEC-adoption framework where BOBS has declared the product category within its mandatory conformity assessment scope; expected by BERA and BPC as part of grid-connection technical compliance — confirm precise scope with BOBS, BERA, and BPC
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408 EMC testing is a requirement for voluntary CQC/CGC certification; not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements under the Botswana BOBS IEC-adoption framework. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model. Confirm whether Botswana grid voltage conditions (230/400 V) require retesting compared to test results obtained under 220/380 V Chinese grid conditions. Verify current BOBS mandatory conformity scope, BERA technical conditions, and BPC EMC evidence requirements directly with each authority before submitting equipment documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足博茨瓦纳BOBS IEC采纳框架下的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。须从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请确认博茨瓦纳电网电压条件（230/400 V）是否需要相较于中国220/380 V电网条件下的测试结果重新测试。在提交设备文件前，请直接向各相关机构核实现行BOBS强制性合规范围、BERA技术条件和BPC EMC证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足波札那BOBS IEC採納框架下的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。須從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請確認波札那電網電壓條件（230/400 V）是否需要相較於中國220/380 V電網條件下的測試結果重新測試。在提交設備文件前，請直接向各相關機構核實現行BOBS強制性合規範圍、BERA技術條件和BPC EMC證據要求。
